pr.title: Record: Int6 QAT + SmearGate + Muon WD (val_bpb=1.1669)

output.summary: Int6 QAT with fp16 embedding passthrough, zstd22-friendly int6-in-int8 storage, SmearGate bigram gate, and Muon WD to keep 9L/512d model tiny yet robust.
techniques: Straight-through Int6 QAT with fp16 tied embeddings to limit quantization drift
zstd22-friendly int6-in-int8 storage keeping artifact under 16MB
Muon optimizer with decoupled weight decay plus SmearGate bigram gating
